title: Newly Rich
writer: Sinclair Lewis, Edward E. Paramore Jr., Joseph L. Mankiewicz
actors: Mitzi Green, Edna May Oliver, Louise Fazenda
plot: Two small town widows bring their children to Hollywood, where their children become competing film stars. The girl is sweet, the boy is a killjoy sissy. For publicity, the rival families go to London to meet a middle European boy...
